description: Detects addEventListener calls in JavaScript without corresponding removeEventListener -- potential memory leak. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes where method is `addEventListener`, without cross-file matching of removeEventListener calls, without { once: true } or { signal: ... } suppression, and without anonymous handler detection.

flag.message: addEventListener call detected -- verify a matching removeEventListener is present or use { once: true } / AbortController to avoid memory leaks
